verse_text: They shall leave none of it until morning, nor break one of its bones. According to all the rule of Pascha, they shall keep it.

links.context: Not a bone of Christ's Body was broken ([[JOH.19:33]], [[JOH.19:36]]), which fulfilled this commandment concerning Pascha (see also [[NUM.9:12]]). We see the strong connection between the type and the reality (JohnChr).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
